title: Context of the Organization
description: Understanding the organization and its context, needs of interested parties, determining scope of ISMS, and establishing the ISMS.

title: Leadership
description: Top management leadership, policy, organizational roles and responsibilities.

title: Planning
description: Actions to address risks and opportunities, information security objectives and planning.

title: Support
description: Resources, competence, awareness, communication, documented information.

title: Operation
description: Operational planning and control, risk assessment, risk treatment.

title: Performance Evaluation
description: Monitoring, measurement, analysis, evaluation, internal audit, management review.

title: Improvement
description: Continual improvement, nonconformity and corrective action.
